student_verification.name: AML Part B Student
student_verification.declaration: I confirm that all LLM interactions listed below are complete and accurate, and that all decisions regarding ablation choices, failure mode identification, and honest reflection are my own.

interactions.prompt: What failure mode would connect to the bag-of-features assumption I identified in Task 1.2?
interactions.response_summary: Strongly suggested negation-rich text as it directly violates BoF — the scope of 'not' is not captured.
interactions.student_modification: N/A — code was rewritten based on conceptual guidance only

interactions.prompt: How do I generate a negation-rich synthetic test set?
interactions.response_summary: Suggested constructing positive examples from negated negative words and vice versa.
interactions.student_modification: Modified negation generation to include neutral context words and shuffle word order for realism.

interactions.prompt: What is the standard NLP technique for handling negation in bag-of-words models?
interactions.response_summary: Described the NOT_ prefix approach (Das & Chen 2007, Pang & Lee 2002) as a concrete modification suggestion.
interactions.student_modification: N/A — code was rewritten based on conceptual guidance only
